lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
The vehicle is in fair condition. It is mechanically functional but shows noticeable wear and tear. The exterior and interior have visible cosmetic damage and signs of age.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows signs of regular use over the years. The exterior has a few noticeable scratches and a small dent on the driver-side fender, though the paint still holds a decent shine. Inside, the upholstery shows some wear and minor staining consistent with its age, but all electronics and climate controls are fully functional. Mechanically, the car starts and drives reliably, though it may soon require routine maintenance like a brake pad replacement or new tires. It’s a solid, dependable choice for someone looking for a functional vehicle at a reasonable price point.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it shows its age and mileage. The exterior has several minor scratches and a small dent on the rear passenger door, with some visible fading on the roof's clear coat. Inside, the upholstery shows noticeable wear on the driver's seat and some staining on the carpets, though all electronics and climate controls remain functional. Mechanically, the engine starts reliably and the transmission shifts through all gears, but the car would benefit from a suspension tune-up and new tires in the near future. It is a solid choice for someone looking for functional transportation at a reasonable price point who doesn't mind some aesthetic imperfections.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It shows significant wear on the interior and exterior and requires mechanical attention. It is not in reliable running order.

Looking for a fantastic project car or a reliable source for parts? This vehicle is ready for a new lease on life! While it is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs to get back on the road, it offers a wonderful opportunity for a DIY enthusiast or mechanic looking for their next big challenge at an unbeatable price!

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating a consistent history of care, the automobile offers robust performance and a refined interior aesthetic. It has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to verify its mechanical integrity and functional standards, ensuring a reliable and sophisticated driving experience. We invite you to experience the enduring quality and exceptional value this specimen provides.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a reliable ride without the brand-new price tag. It runs great and is ready for its next adventure! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I’d love to see it go to a good home!
Up for sale is a mechanically robust E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54B32 inline
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained engine. Interior is clean. No mechanical issues. Ready for immediate sale.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive overall shape, making it an ideal choice for a reliable daily driver. The exterior retains a brilliant metallic luster that catches the light beautifully, showing only minor, expected signs of road use such as faint stone chips on the front bumper. Inside, the smoke-free cabin features premium leather upholstery that remains supple and supportive, with only light creasing on the driver’s bolster. All onboard technology, including the high-definition infotainment system and dual-zone climate control, operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts with precision, reflecting a consistent maintenance history of timely synthetic oil changes and recent brake service. The tires have significant tread remaining, and the suspension offers a balanced, comfortable ride. This car delivers a premium driving experience and comes with a clean title and complete service records.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, this unit has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for reliability and performance. Featuring a clean profile and a well-appointed interior, it offers a balanced combination of sophistication and enduring value. We invite you to experience a vehicle that exemplifies quality and dependable engineering.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit delivers reliable performance and a refined driving experience. Every component has been evaluated to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for operational excellence.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a reliable car without the brand-new price tag. It runs smoothly and looks great—ready for its next adventure! Come take it for a spin, I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I do!

This E46 M3 is a purist’s specification, featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six engine equipped with individual throttle bodies and a factory 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The mechanical highlights include a documented VANOS system overhaul and a reinforced rear subframe, addressing the platform's primary structural concerns. The chassis maintains its composure through corners thanks to a limited-slip M-Differential and refreshed suspension bushings. While the exterior displays a light patina reflective of its mileage, the powertrain remains robust with a linear power delivery and the signature metallic rasp from the tuned exhaust. It is a mechanically sound, driver-oriented example ready for spirited use.
Used car in good condition. Well maintained. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic blend of performance and comfort, presenting in solid condition both inside and out. The exterior retains a beautiful luster with only minor, expected signs of road wear that do not detract from its overall sharp appearance. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, featuring well-preserved upholstery and a full suite of electronics that function exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is sound, having undergone regular servicing to ensure a smooth and responsive ride. With its reliable history and well-cared-for status, this car is ready to provide its next owner with years of dependable service. A thorough inspection confirms it is a high-quality choice for any discerning buyer.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for reliability and performance. Featuring a clean history and robust service records, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning professional. We invite you to experience the caliber of our inventory firsthand.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it balances refined aesthetics with reliable mechanical performance. Every aspect of this automobile has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and longevity. Experience the perfect synthesis of luxury and value in a vehicle that remains as capable as it is sophisticated.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's been super well-loved? I'm parting with my trusty car, and it's in great shape and totally ready for its next adventure! It runs like a dream and has been perfect for both my daily commutes and weekend road trips. It's got plenty of life left in it, and I'd love to see it go to a great new home. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!
Offered is a mechanically sound 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera (996.2) featuring the 3.6L M96 flat-six
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Ready for immediate sale.

Offered here is a truly dependable and well-kept example of a modern classic, perfect for a buyer who values both performance and reliability. Having been primarily garage-kept and serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, this vehicle strikes an excellent balance of quality and value. The exterior bodywork is straight and the paint remains vibrant, showing only the light cosmetic character consistent with careful, routine use. Stepping inside, you’ll find an interior that is both inviting and highly functional; the premium upholstery shows minimal wear, the carpets are pristine, and all electronic components—including the dual-zone climate control and infotainment system—are in perfect working order. Mechanically, the car is exceptionally sound, providing smooth power delivery and responsive handling that reflects its consistent upkeep. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil service and a thorough multi-point inspection, ensuring the vehicle is turnkey and ready for the road. This is an ideal choice for someone seeking a high-quality, well-documented vehicle that has been treated with respect.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has been rigorously maintained to preserve its performance benchmarks and cabin comfort. Offering a seamless blend of reliability and executive presence, it stands as a premier selection for those who demand uncompromising quality in their daily transport. Available for immediate acquisition.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure performance standards that meet our rigorous criteria. Offering a balanced combination of reliability and sophisticated engineering, it represents an exceptional value for the discerning driver seeking both quality and longevity.

Hey there! Are you looking for a super reliable ride that's ready for its next adventure? I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and it's honestly in such great shape! It’s been well-loved and runs like a dream, making it perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend getaway. You're going to love how it handles on the road! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, equipped with individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. Power is delivered via a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a factory variable M-differential. The chassis remains composed with a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed bushings, ensuring the legendary 50/50 weight distribution remains communicative. Recent maintenance includes a VANOS system overhaul and valve clearance adjustment, ensuring the valvetrain operates with mechanical perfection. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age, the powertrain and suspension geometry are dialed in for peak lateral grip and throttle response.
Used car. Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Service records available.

This 2019 Audi A6 Premium Plus has been meticulously cared for and presents beautifully in Moonlight Blue Metallic. The exterior remains in impressive shape, showing only minor signs of road use typical for its age, with a deep luster to the paint and no significant blemishes or dents. Inside, the Nougat Brown leather interior is pristine and smoke-free, featuring the Audi Virtual Cockpit and a panoramic sunroof that functions perfectly. Mechanically, this vehicle is sound; it has a complete service history, shifts smoothly through all gears, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining. It offers a balanced blend of performance and luxury, making it an ideal choice for someone seeking a high-quality, dependable executive sedan without the new-car price tag. All electronics and climate control systems are fully operational, ensuring a comfortable and reliable driving experience.

We are pleased to offer this impeccably maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of mechanical reliability and aesthetic refinement. This unit has been rigorously vetted to ensure it meets our stringent standards for performance and structural integrity. Representing a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer, this vehicle delivers a sophisticated driving experience and remains in a state of commendable preservation, ready for immediate service.
